meta.title: Implement core notification processing and rate limiting

subtask.role: You are a Rust Engineer specializing in high-performance systems. Implement subtask 2.2.

context.overview: Build the main notification endpoint with validation, rate limiting using Redis, and deduplication logic to handle incoming notification requests efficiently.

requirements.description: Create POST /api/v1/notifications endpoint with comprehensive input validation, implement Redis-based rate limiting middleware with configurable limits per user/IP, add deduplication logic using Redis with configurable TTL to prevent duplicate notifications, implement request parsing and validation using serde with proper error responses.
